title: Lightning Route Blinding
description: A privacy technique where receivers hide destination topology by providing blinded route hints.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Book-length explanation of Lightning channel, routing, and operational tradeoffs tied to this topic.

resources.title: BOLT 04: Onion Routing Protocol
resources.notes: Core onion routing mechanics used by blinding methods.

resources.title: BOLT 12: Offers
resources.notes: Offer and invoice request fields that carry blinded path data.
